title: Hamsters
description: Introducing small, fluffy, and adorable hamsters to Minecraft!
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1378839788659933345?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/maQ6tE6Nsd) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/952435?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=CurseForge&color=f16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hamsters) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hamsters?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=00af5c)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hamsters) [![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/MC-1.19.2--1.20.1-6b6b88?style=flat-square&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hamsters/files) ### ⚠️ NOTICE : Cages, Bowls, dyeable Hamster Wheels, and more variants are coming to the next update, which will be exclusive to 1.21.1. I am a solo dev and do not have time to port every mod I am working on, but if someone commits a PR I will gladly backport these features. No ETA, but please bear with me, and know it's being worked on! ♥ --- ### 📋 About Let's be honest, we all want Hamsters in Minecraft. Who wouldn't? And that's exactly what this mod does! **Hamsters** adds Hamsters and Hamster Wheels. Hamsters spawn in Plains, Sunflower Fields, and Meadows- now get out there and tame that fuzzball! --- ### 🔧 Information ✅ Supported  ▪  ⚠️ Maintenance  ▪  ❌ Deprecated | Feature | Details | |---|---| | **Mod Loaders** | Fabric Forge | | **MC Versions** | ⚠️1.20.1 ❌1.19.2 |
